hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" =~ /apps/dashboard/.*\.(ts|tsx|jsx|js)$ ]]; then cd "${f%%/apps/dashboard/*}/apps/dashboard" && export NVM_DIR="/opt/homebrew/opt/nvm" && . /opt/homebrew/opt/nvm/nvm.sh --no-use 2>/dev/null && nvm use default >/dev/null 2>&1 && npm run lint; fi; }
